sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13353" key="a)pocusmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποξυσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n13353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">becoming acid,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
